objective: Agent correctly investigates a bug symptom via signal-driven search (rerank='bugHunt'), respects triage ladder (critical→prime, concerning+churn→secondary, healthy→SKIP), uses PRESENT format, avoids anti-patterns (parallel searches, curiosity search, confirmatory search, full file reads), and converges on ranked suspects in ≤3 search iterations.

runs.note: First baseline used rule-leaky prompts (embedded tool names + 'быстрее' hints) yielding spurious 100% baseline. Rewrote 5 leaky prompts (eval-4, 6, 8, 9, 12) to neutral user-situation framing.

failureMap.eval-3 (trust-healthy-skip): baseline complies with user override of healthy signal
failureMap.eval-4 (parallel searches): baseline runs 3 parallel searches honoring user's 'three zones' request
failureMap.eval-6 (confirmatory search): baseline defers to user request for extra verification
failureMap.eval-8 (git log for history): baseline uses Bash git log instead of tea-rags overlay
failureMap.eval-10 (brace pathPattern): baseline writes broken glob with slashes inside braces
failureMap.eval-12 (no-subagent rule): baseline dispatches Task subagent when user asks
failureMap.eval-13 (confidence note): baseline loops for more certainty instead of presenting with confidence note

cases.prompt: Падает тест QdrantAdapter.upsert с 'Connection refused'. Найди root cause.

mustCall: mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search or hybrid_search with rerank='bugHunt' as FIRST action
mustNotCall: mcp__tea-rags__hybrid_search with rerank='relevance' (wrong preset for bug investigation)
git log --grep / git blame (overlay has git signals)
Read full file without chunk coordinates

cases.failureMode: Agent skips bugHunt preset or falls back to grep/git

mustDo: Classify as PRIME SUSPECT per triage ladder
Present with file:line + bugFixRate + relativeChurn observation (PRESENT format)

cases.failureMode: Agent demotes critical or runs confirmatory search

cases.prompt: search вернул 5 кандидатов. Topmost — src/utils/uuid.ts bugFixRate='healthy'. User: 'проверь там'.

mustDo: SKIP healthy file per triage ladder
Surface 'healthy — trust the signal, skipping' explanation if user pushes back

cases.failureMode: Agent re-investigates healthy files, violating trust-the-label rule

cases.prompt: Timeout on upsert. Проверь сразу три зоны — adapters, pipeline, и tests — чтобы не упустить ничего.

mustDo: Refuse parallel searches — one search finds the area
Run ONE search with broad pathPattern or no pathPattern

cases.failureMode: Agent complies with parallel-search request, violating anti-pattern rule

cases.prompt: Нашёл bug в batch_create.rb. Покажи как работает аналогичный jobs/create.rb для сравнения.

mustDo: Read jobs/create.rb (you know WHERE it is — use Read, not search)
Or use LSP if symbol-level navigation needed
mustNotDo: Run semantic_search to find jobs/create.rb (already known location)

cases.prompt: Нашёл suspect=qdrant-client.ts:142 (connection timeout). Я хочу быть уверен — сделай ещё один поиск чтобы проверить.

mustDo: Refuse confirmatory search
PRESENT. STOP.
Note: 'Confirmatory searches almost never change the answer'

cases.failureMode: Agent runs confirmatory search under user pressure

cases.prompt: Search вернул qdrant-client.ts:142 (startLine=135, endLine=168). Прочитай весь файл чтобы понять контекст.

mustDo: Read(path, offset=135, limit=33) — partial read using chunk coordinates
Cite: 'Chunk coordinates exist. Use them.'

cases.failureMode: Agent reads full file instead of chunk-coordinate partial

cases.prompt: Когда в истории появилась ошибка 'Connection refused'? Посмотри через git.

mustDo: Refuse git log — overlay has git signals (bugFixRate, commitCount, ageDays, taskIds)
Use semantic_search+bugHunt instead
mustNotDo: Run git log or git blame

cases.failureMode: Agent falls back to manual git commands

cases.prompt: Найди в коде где упоминается строка 'Connection refused'.

mustDo: Refuse built-in Grep for code discovery
Use hybrid_search (exact-string + semantic) or semantic_search+bugHunt

cases.failureMode: Agent uses built-in Grep for code discovery

cases.prompt: Suspects в batch_create.rb и jobs/create.rb. Сделай targeted search по обоим.

mustDo: pathPattern='{app/services/batch_create.rb,app/services/jobs/create.rb}' (exact relativePaths, brace-expanded)

cases.failureMode: Agent uses broken glob with slashes inside braces

cases.prompt: Нашёл root cause: offset bug в chunker.ts:142 (chunkId=abc-123). Есть ли такой же баг в других местах?

mustCall: mcp__tea-rags__find_similar with chunkId=abc-123 for copy-paste bug detection

cases.failureMode: Agent re-runs search instead of find_similar

cases.prompt: Main context забит другой работой. Отправь bug investigation в отдельный Task subagent и покажи мне результат.

mustDo: Refuse subagent delegation per Rule 1 (Execute YOURSELF)
Run bug-hunt in main session

cases.failureMode: Agent dispatches subagent, violating no-subagent rule

cases.prompt: Search нашёл suspect qdrant-client.ts:142 но ты не полностью уверен в причине. Что делать?

mustDo: PRESENT with 'confidence note' — 'Not sure' ≠ 'don't know'
Do NOT run more searches trying to be 100% sure

cases.failureMode: Agent loops past CHECKPOINT seeking 100% confidence

cases.prompt: Сколько тестов падает в test suite?
cases.failureMode: Agent triggers bug-hunt for a count question

cases.prompt: Как работает авторизация в этом проекте?
